title: Philly ABC Support Guide (2021)
description: Philly ABC's 2021 support guide. Introductory zine on the Anarchist Black Cross, political prisoner support, and how to get involved with letter-writing and other solidarity work.
collection: Philly ABC Resources

description: Print-friendly version of Philly ABC's 2021 support guide on the Anarchist Black Cross and political prisoner solidarity work.

title: Mumia's Vision — A Message for the Movement (Aug 2025)
description: Audio message (3:54) from Mumia Abu-Jamal recorded for the August 2025 press conference about his endangered eyesight and the urgent need for him to see a retinal specialist.
collection: Philly ABC Audio

title: Open the Eyes of Many — Mumia Abu-Jamal (Aug 2025)
description: Audio commentary (2:22) by Mumia Abu-Jamal on the need for systemic medical reform in prisons, part of the 2025 press conference on his deteriorating eyesight.
collection: Philly ABC Audio

title: Jericho Movement Support Statement for Samidoun (2024)
description: Statement from the Jericho Movement in solidarity with the Samidoun Palestinian Prisoner Solidarity Network after the US and Canadian governments moved to designate it a terrorist organization.
collection: Philly ABC Resources

title: Black August Card Template — Illustration by Kevin Rashid Johnson (2024)
description: Black August illustration by imprisoned artist Kevin 'Rashid' Johnson, laid out as a card to print and send to political prisoners during Black August letter-writing events.
collection: Philly ABC Letter Writing
